AddChannelsRequest.title: AddChannelsRequest
AddChannelsRequest.description: Raw user input — one or many links/usernames, newline- or comma-separated.

TdataImportResult.title: TdataImportResult
TdataImportResult.description:
Outcome of one :func:`services.accounts.sessions.import_account_tdata` call.

Wrapping the imported accounts in a model (instead of returning a raw
``list[AccountRead]``) keeps the service boundary Pydantic-only, leaves room
to add per-import metadata (counts, partial-failure summaries) without
breaking every call site, and matches the convention used by ``list_accounts``
and other multi-row reads.

WarmingAccountState.title: WarmingAccountState
WarmingAccountState.description: One account's warming status, rendered as a kanban card.

WarmingBoardState.title: WarmingBoardState
WarmingBoardState.description: Everything the warming page renders in one poll tick.

WarmingChannel.title: WarmingChannel
WarmingChannel.description: One channel the warming engine can join / read / react in.

WarmingReadiness.title: WarmingReadiness
WarmingReadiness.description:
Pre-start verdict for an account: can it safely begin warming?

``reasons`` is empty iff ``ready`` is True — each entry is a short,
human-readable blocker (``"session new"``, ``"no proxy"``, ``"no channels"``).

WarmingSettings.title: WarmingSettings
WarmingSettings.description: Masked, UI-facing warming settings — never carries the raw Gemini key.

WarmingSettingsUpdate.title: WarmingSettingsUpdate
WarmingSettingsUpdate.description:
Caller-supplied settings change from the UI.

``gemini_api_key`` semantics: ``None`` leaves the stored key untouched, an
empty string clears it, any other value replaces it. Same applies to
``gemini_model`` — ``None`` keeps current value, non-empty overrides.
An explicit ``clear_gemini_key`` flag is provided so the UI can clear the
stored key without ambiguity.

WarmingSummary.title: WarmingSummary
WarmingSummary.description: Fleet-level roll-up shown at the top of the warming page.
